<!--
Thank you for the pull request. Please fill out the sections below before
requesting review. PRs that skip these sections may be sent back without a
read.
-->

## What

<!-- One sentence on what this PR changes. -->

## Why

<!-- The problem or need this addresses. Link the issue if there is one. -->

## How

<!-- The shape of the change. Mention any files / scripts / agents touched. -->

## Quality gates

- [ ] `make lint` exits 0
- [ ] `make typecheck` exits 0
- [ ] `make test` exits 0
- [ ] `make check-quality` exits 0
- [ ] `make check-links` exits 0 (or documented false-positives)
- [ ] If a content gate fired during development, a new test was added covering it

## Screenshots / output

<!-- If this changes the published pages, include a screenshot or a diff
of the rendered output. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] No marketing badges or unverified claims added
- [ ] No first-person pronouns (`I`, `we`, `my`, `our`) in published pages
- [ ] No internal IDs (`VM-001`, `CH-006`, etc.) in user-facing prose
- [ ] No jargon ("kill experiment", "north star", "red team", etc.) in user-facing prose
- [ ] No run-ID timestamps in published pages
- [ ] Every numeric claim cites a verifiable source URL
- [ ] If this adds a new page, it has H1, citable summary lead, JSON-LD, OG tags, canonical URL, and is in the nav
